meaning: n.全息摄影术 全息术
examples: An alternative approach to creating 3-d images is based on holography.
In this paper, the thermal deformation of a plate is measured by Phase shifting laser holography interference.
In terms of the principle of laser holography interference, the relation between interference and displacement is obtained.
The next generation of 3-D will go beyond stereovision tricks and into the realm of holography.
However, according to Dr Trolinger, electronic holography for scientific purposes need not suffer from that limitation.
